name: nimbo
description: LLM fine-tuning to on-device deployment — LoRA/QLoRA training, CoreML conversion, and iOS deployment via natural language

plugins.name: nimbo
plugins.description: Fine-tune language models with LoRA/QLoRA, convert to CoreML, and deploy to iOS — all through natural language in Claude Code. Supports LLaMA, Mistral, Phi, Qwen, EXAONE and more.
